powers.label: Make 5 of a Kind
powers.description: Click any die on an incomplete row, pick 1–6 — the whole row becomes that number (no extra charge for that row)

powers.label: Set Any Die
powers.description: Set any die (including locked) to 1–6 — uses 1 reroll

powers.label: Side Switch
powers.description: Swap two adjacent dice left or right — does not lock dice

powers.label: Vertical Jump
powers.description: Jump over locked rows to swap with the next die in a column — locks both dice

powers.label: Second Chances
powers.description: Each die can be vertically swapped twice before locking

powers.label: Reroll Trade
powers.description: Spend 2 rerolls to gain 1 switch (any time)

powers.label: Switch Rows
powers.description: Swap all dice between any two rows, including completed patterns (1 charge per level)
